shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Soft border support for card modules

motion.name: transition-all
motion.purpose: Quick active scale-down for responsive buttons

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard action triggers for adding records, appointments, and confirm billing.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">เพิ่มประวัติใหม่</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Kanit', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 16px; background-color: #0ea5e9; color: #ffffff; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #0284c7; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

components.name: Clinical Card
components.description: White card container for wrapping individual modules on the clinic dashboard.
components.html:
หัวข้อโมดูล

เนื้อหารายละเอียดข้อมูลของคนไข้
components.css: .ds-card-base { background-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(241, 245, 249, 0.5); padding: 28px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Kanit', sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; color: #1e293b; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Sarabun', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #475569; line-height: 1.6; }

narrative.overview: Anping ClinicHub centers around a tactile, highly clean, and density-optimized grid layout. Built to support rapid clinical tasks, EMR reading, and billing flows, the design prioritizes clean cards and clear monospaced numbers. It rejects legibility shortcuts like thin fonts and washed-out colors.
keyCharacteristics: High contrast text hierarchy for medical values
Auto-hiding headers and bottom bars to optimize mobile viewing space

rules.name: The Reassuring Accent Rule
rules.body: Sky Blue accent is reserved for primary actions, selection states, and focus states. It must never exceed 10% of any screen surface.

rules.name: The Monospace Contrast Rule
rules.body: All alphanumeric codes (HN, Citizen ID, queue index, prices) must use JetBrains Mono or Roboto Mono with high contrast colors to ensure prompt and error-free reading.

dos: Do use distinct active scale-down (scale-95) transitions on all button triggers.
Do use readable ink colors (text-slate-800) for body text over white card backgrounds.
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders (e.g. border-left-4) as indicators on medical files.
Don't animate image or card thumbnails on hover.
Don't use thin gray fonts that drop below 4.5:1 contrast ratio.
